{{Quote|Lord Nirama has been mosth gracious. He has offeredth me a job flying for him.|Teeloo|<ref name="POB" />}}
'''Teeloo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who owner the ''[[Neeva-Beelo]]'', a [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210]] transport during the time of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="POB" />

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Teeloo had a large family, with six sisters, four brothers, and at least one aunt and one uncle. He also had an undetermined number of cousins, who were disliked by their father.<ref name="POB" />

An uncle gave him a ship, the [[YT-1210 light freighter/Legends|YT-1210]] light transport ''[[Neeva-Beelo]]'', mostly to annoy Teeloo's cousins, who were looking forward to inherit it. His uncle also gave him some basic flying lessons and a small cargo, which consisted of a few animal skins, [[Rodian ale]], and some other items, to get started in a business. Teeloo accepted the gifts, but he believed his cousins were very angry at it. Teeloo's plan was to take his mother, aunt, and siblings with him when he made a jump to the system where he wanted to work the rest of his life, and stay there — He hated astrogating.<ref name="POB" />

One night Teeloo heard somebody trying to get into the ''Neeva-Beelo'', and thinking it was his cousins, he took off. He looked for an out-of-the-way system to go to, and found the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]]. His hyperdrive blew out when he reverted from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Looking for a place to repair, he went to [[Tolea Biqua]].<ref name="POB" />

Unfortunately, Teeloo's inexperience with flying meant he did not notice a small [[Snubfighter/Legends|snubfighter]] near his ship as he turned toward his approach vector — He believed sensors would automatically report that without him checking them out. He rammed the fighter, which belonged to a member of the [[Blood Raptors]] gang, sending it spinning off. He laid low in his ship for a day, but he needed to sell his cargo and get started on repairs, so he eventually left the ''Neeva-Beelo''. When he did, the Blood Raptors were waiting.<ref name="POB" />

The Raptors, led by [[Scar Blenner]], roughed Teeloo up and took his cargo. They also said they were going to take his ship if he did not beat one of them in a race through [[Eskaron]] the next day. If he did manage to win, they said they would return his cargo — although they intended to keep Teeloo's ship no matter the race. The cargo had already been taken away and the Blood Raptors were just giving him a little more roughing up to remember them by when a group of Cularin's heroic individuals happened by and chased off the Raptors.<ref name="POB" />

Teeloo's rescuers offered to help him win the race. They might have repaired several of the ''Neeva-Beelo''{{'s}} many problems and crewed his ship during the race against the Raptor pilot [[Gael Kinner]]. The race covered [[The Spiral]], [[Skinning the Mynock]] and the [[Cavern of Teeth]] in Eskaron and then, the first pilot to get out of the planet could choose the final part: Either go through the [[Cularin asteroid belt]] and back, or visit the dangerous city of [[Nub Saar]] before returning to Tolea Biqua.<ref name="POB" />

During the middle of the race, Teeloo's opponent ended up destroying a ship in another race which was sponsored by Cularin's crimelord, [[Nirama]]. This brought Teeloo to Nirama's attention. They also had a brush with the local [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], who operated from the asteroid belt.<ref name="POB" />

After the race, the Blood Raptors decided to take the ship. Nirama's men interrupted the fight, and took all involved before Nirama. The crimelord determined that the Blood Raptors were responsible for the destruction of his ship, and punished them. To Teeloo, he offered to repair the ''Neeva-Beelo'' completely, and Teeloo could work for him to pay off the debt.<ref name="POB" />

Teeloo was grateful to Nirama for the opportunity,<ref name="POB" /> and worked for him loyally, despite having to sometimes become a smuggler. His service for Nirama was not exclusive, and he did other work around the Cularin system, including some work for [[Renna's Transport Service]]. Teeloo and [[Renna (Rodian)|Renna]] became friends and eventually became romantically involved. Teeloo's loyalty to Nirama became his doom when [[Riboga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] moved to take back control of Cularin's crime toward the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Riboga targeted those who worked for Nirama, and Teeloo was killed.

==Personality and traits==
Teeloo was a kind-hearted and likable Rodian. He was not extremely bright, but was loyal and reliable. He could be proud–he would not let Renna pay off his debt to Nirama for him. He spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] with a lisp.<ref name="POB" />

His running from [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] on short notice changed his plan to take his family with him. It is unknown if he went back for them before the Cularin system disappeared for almost a decade.<ref name="POB" />
